'''Lon''' was a light-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. He was imprisoned at [[Balis-Baurgh]] where he met and befriended [[Junas Turner]] and [[Grael]] the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]]. After Turner and Grael escaped the [[Balis-Baurgh prison|prison]], they resolved to rescue Lon and fellow inmate [[Becker]].<ref name="EBB" />

*{{JournalCite|1|Escape from Balis-Baurgh|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
